Image Cache

Stillwater caches downloaded images locally. Set a maximum size to keep disk usage bounded; clearing the cache removes all downloaded images and they will be re-fetched on next use. Read more →

When an artist comes from a connected media server but Stillwater cannot resolve the artist's folder on disk, downloaded cover art is stored in a local image cache instead so the UI can still render thumbnails. This section shows the cache size, lets you cap how big it can grow, and lets you clear it.

Loading...
Limits how much disk space cached images may occupy. When the cache reaches this size the oldest entries are evicted first. Choose Unlimited to never evict automatically. Read more →
Removes all locally cached images immediately. Artists are still visible but their images are re-fetched from providers on next access. Read more →
